extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR won the Jebel Jais summit finish after GUERREIRO attacked at the flamme rouge, PLAPP drove the final kilometer for YATES but POGAČAR's sprint prevailed
tactical_patterns: PLAPP lifted pace at barriers final km for YATES, essentially pre-leading POGAČAR's sprint train against team intent
GANNA finished only 2 seconds down on summit finish despite TT specialist profile, signals UAE altitude camp weakness
MAJKA burned entire UAE team early on climb forcing POGAČAR isolated sprint, tactical error against deep Ineos squad
DUMOULIN dropped after big TT effort reveals multi-day power conflict between specialists pushing both disciplines hard
HIRT and TAARAMÄE softening attacks for MEINTJES showed Intermarche depth willing to sacrifice GC cards for team leader

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: won from isolated position after teammates burned early, confirms sprint strength compensates tactical errors
rider_signals.PLAPP Luke: positive: paced final kilometer at Australian champion level, dangerous in future mountain sprint leadouts despite helping rivals
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: only 2 seconds down on summit finish defying TT-specialist profile, GC threat if given full leadership
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: followed wheels perfectly but couldn't outsprint POGAČAR, needs attacks not positioning to win
rider_signals.GUERREIRO Ruben: neutral: attacked at flamme rouge but absorbed, showed EF willing to gamble from distance
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: dropped on climb day-after TT victory, confirms inability to sustain back-to-back peak efforts
rider_signals.MAJKA Rafał: negative: burned UAE team prematurely leaving POGAČAR isolated, tactical mismanagement on home terrain
rider_signals.HIRT Jan: positive: worked as super-domestic for MEINTJES despite own GC placement, signals Intermarche tactical discipline
rider_signals.TAARAMÄE Rein: positive: same softening work as HIRT, veteran willing to sacrifice personal GC for team dynamics
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: early crash requiring concussion protocol compromised sprint day preparation rhythm
